message:
fix(gen_server): abort reply obligation when DropOldest evicts a Call envelope

When a cast with DropOldest overflow policy evicts an existing Call
envelope from the mailbox, the reply permit's obligation token was
being silently dropped, causing an "OBLIGATION TOKEN LEAKED" panic.

Now both GenServerHandle::try_cast and GenServerRef::try_cast
explicitly check whether the evicted envelope was a Call and abort
its reply_permit, ensuring the obligation is resolved cleanly
rather than leaked.

Add test gen_server_drop_oldest_evicting_call_aborts_obligation that
verifies a Call envelope can be evicted without panicking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
